description: ISS-067 discoverability: when a player has a scout in Strategic Reserves and reaches the pre-battle Scout step, the option to set it up must be visible WITHOUT any manual refresh, and the on-screen status text must explicitly point to it (the prior text was just a generic 'Phase: SCOUT'). This scenario puts a P1 scout into strategic reserves, enters SCOUT with P1 active, and asserts (a) the unit list shows the reserve scout as '[Reserves -> DZ]' on natural entry, and (b) the status label calls out the '[Reserves -> DZ]' set-up option. Mirrors the real workflow where reserves are declared in the Formations phase (same resulting state: status IN_RESERVES + reserve_type strategic_reserves).
